matcher_value: bash -lc 'read cpu user nice system idle iowait irq softirq steal guest guest_nice < /proc/stat; total1=$((user + nice + system + idle + iowait + irq + softirq + steal)); idle1=$((idle + iowait)); sleep 1; read cpu user nice system idle iowait irq softirq steal guest guest_nice < /proc/stat; total2=$((user + nice + system + idle + iowait + irq + softirq + steal)); idle2=$((idle + iowait)); total_diff=$((total2 - total1)); idle_diff=$((idle2 - idle1)); cpu_usage=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.2f\", (1 - $idle_diff / $total_diff) * 100}"); echo "CPU Usage: ${cpu_usage}%"'
